channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Weekly Cartoon Commentary by Gabrielle Drolet
item.description: The Globe and Mail's 'News To Me – Air Force None' is a weekly cartoon column written by Gabrielle Drolet, an author and chronic pain memoirist. This edition continues Drolet's tradition of blending h...

item.title: Rising Tensions Between US and Iran: Analyzing the Geopolitical Landscape
item.description: Recent escalations in tensions between the United States and Iran are sparking concerns across the globe, drawing parallels to Hollywood rescue narratives. While a Hollywood-style rescue remains a cin...

item.title: 19 Killed in Negros Clash Including Fil-Am Activist, Probe Ongoing
item.description: A total of 19 individuals were killed in an armed encounter in Barangay Salamanca, Toboso, Negros Occidental on April 19, including a Filipino-American human rights advocate identified as Lyle Prijole...

item.title: Reinterpreting the Kamasutra as a text centred on consent, mutual desire, and women’s agency
item.description: The article challenges the commonly held belief that the Kamasutra is merely a traditional sex manual rooted in male dominance. Instead, it presents the ancient text, attributed to Vatsyayana, as a nu...

item.title: Fragile Middle East Ceasefires Amid Israeli Expansion and US Withdrawal Plans
item.description: More than two months into a US-Israeli offensive against Iran, the conflict has bogged down into fragile ceasefires rather than a decisive victory. A two-week truce between Tehran and Washington, brok...

item.title: Wayfair Offers Significant Discounts During Way Day Sale
item.description: Wayfair has launched its Way Day Sale, providing shoppers in Canada with significant discounts of up to 80% on a wide range of home products. Running from Saturday, April 25 to Monday, April 27, the s...

item.title: 14-year-old Charlotte Ehioghae becomes second-fastest under-18 200m runner in Australian history
item.description: Charlotte Ehioghae, a 14-year-old schoolgirl from Perth, has stunned the athletics community with her incredible performance in the 200m race. She became the second-fastest female 200m runner in Austr...

item.title: Two held after caste-related remark leads to clash during wedding procession in Shahjahanpur
item.description: Two individuals have been detained following a clash reportedly triggered by a caste-related remark during a wedding procession in Uttar Pradesh’s Shahjahanpur district. The incident took place on Apr...

item.title: Highlights and Performances from the 2026 Stagecoach Music Festival
item.description: The 2026 Stagecoach Music Festival took place this weekend at Indio's Empire Polo Club, offering fans a vibrant celebration of country music. Headliners included Post Malone, Lainey Wilson, and Cody J...

item.title: Plans for a Sequel to the Michael Jackson Biopic Announced
item.description: Effie Spence, who plays Liza Minnelli in the recently released Michael Jackson biopic, has revealed that talks are underway for a potential sequel. Spence praised Jaafar Jackson's performance as his u...

item.title: Nairobi Mother Opens Up on Postpartum Depression and Recovery After Child Loss
item.description: A Nairobi mother of three, Tess Karanja, has opened up about her difficult motherhood journey, speaking candidly about child loss, postpartum depression, and eventual healing. Her story shows that mot...

item.title: Man formally charged following the death of his son in Accrington road accident
item.description: A man has been formally charged with murder following the tragic death of his young son in Accrington. The incident occurred when the child was struck by a vehicle, prompting a police investigation. A...

item.title: Canadians debate rising trend of young adults living at home amid affordability pressures
item.description: A growing number of young adults in Canada are continuing to live with their parents, reflecting broader economic pressures such as rising housing costs, inflation, and job uncertainty. According to S...

item.title: 110,000 Devotees Visit Kedarnath in 3 Days, Kedarnath Temple Leaders Appreciate Yatra Arrangements by Uttarakhand Govt
item.description: The Char Dham Yatra to Kedarnath has seen a significant rise in devotees since the opening of the temple portals, with over 110,000 pilgrims visiting in just three days. The Uttarakhand government has...

item.title: Rising inflation, potential rate hikes and federal budget decisions to strain Australian households
item.description: Australian households are facing a tough few weeks as new inflation data, an upcoming Reserve Bank decision on interest rates, and the federal Budget converge against a backdrop of rising global tensi...

item.title: Makinde urges strong opposition unity to protect Nigeria’s democracy
item.description: Oyo State Governor, Seyi Makinde, don warn say Nigeria democracy go suffer well well if opposition parties continue to weaken or scatter. Him talk this one for Ibadan during one big opposition leaders...

item.title: How Seychelles Built Africa’s Highest Standard of Living Through Tourism and Smart Policies
item.description: Seychelles don stand out as Africa richest country for 2026, no be only because of money but because of the overall better life wey people dey enjoy there. The country get high GDP per capita of about...

item.title: Islamabad reopens transport access and updates business closing hours across the city
item.description: The Islamabad administration has allowed all types of public and goods transport to enter the city, easing earlier restrictions and improving mobility for residents and businesses. However, Faizabad b...

item.title: Opposition Parties Agree to Present One Presidential Candidate for 2027 Election
item.description: On Saturday for Ibadan, leaders from major opposition parties don gather for summit wey Governor Seyi Makinde host. Di summit bring leaders from PDP, ADC, NNPP, plus other political groups together to...

item.title: 32-year-old social media influencer dies following road accident in Soho
item.description: A 32-year-old social media influencer tragically lost their life after being involved in a traffic accident in Soho. The incident, which occurred late in the evening, saw the individual struck by a ve...
